scene.message: Ayase: Owowow...{waitkey}H-{wait_fr:15}huh?{nl} Where are we?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey!{nl} Look at that!!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Ms. Saeko!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Wh-what the?!{waitkey}{ret}
Ms. Saeko: Hffffff...{nl} At last, the time has come.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Ms. Saeko{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30}?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Hey, what's gotten{nl} into you?! Cut the dumb act.{waitkey}It's too harsh for a joke.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: A {wait_fr:30}sacrifice?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: ?{waitkey}You mean everyone{nl} gets frozen?{waitkey}I hate the cold!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Like I'll let you!{nl} Give Ms. Saeko back!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: How do we even{nl} get the mask off?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey!{nl} Are you even listening?!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Ah!{nl} M-Ms. Saeko!!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: A game?!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: ...But~{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey!{nl} What's that?!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Again...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Huh?{nl} "Again"?{waitkey}{ret}
